falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,150 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 low would invalidate the 79% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug, proving this is not a similar bottoming structure and the current HOLD signal was wrong

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for two consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Volatility spiking to panic levels would contradict the BLOWOFF SCORE of 41 (moderate fear, not capitulation), indicating the market is entering a deeper correction rather than forming a bottom

falsification_conditions.condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises above 4.75% and holds there for 3+ consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained yield breakout would signal a regime change in rates that the August 2024 pattern did not face, breaking the structural similarity and invalidating the bottom thesis

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
